payload.author: kimeisele
payload.title: docs: add fork workflow guide covering contribution, sovereign cities, and federation
payload.body:
Describes the three paths (contributor, sister city, sandbox) when someone
forks the repo, including what transfers, what doesn't, security considerations,
and how forks relate to the immigration/visa system.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NRPCeqPz3U3uc27zpGB5xR
